016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.zeromq;
017
018import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.ZmqNotification;
019import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.BitcoinClient;
020
021import java.io.IOException;
022import java.net.URI;
023import java.net.URISyntaxException;
024import java.time.Duration;
025import java.util.List;
026import java.util.Optional;
027
028/**
029 * Utility to use Bitcoin Core JSON-RPC to find configured ZMQ notification ports.
030 */
031public class BitcoinZmqPortFinder {
032    private final BitcoinClient client;
033    private final URI rpcUri;
034    private List<ZmqNotification> notifications;
035
036    public BitcoinZmqPortFinder(BitcoinClient client) {
037        this.client = client;
038        rpcUri = client.getServerURI();
039    }
040
041    public Optional<URI> findPort(BitcoinZmqMessage.Topic topic) {
042        getNotifications();
043        return notifications.stream()
044                .filter(n -> n.type().equals("pub" + topic.toString()))
045                .findFirst()
046                .map(ZmqNotification::address)
047                .map(this::mapUri);
048    }
049    
050    private synchronized void getNotifications() {
051        if (notifications == null) {
052            try {
053                // TODO: We don't want to hang here for 120 seconds or so waiting for a server
054                // client.waitForServer(Duration.ofSeconds(1));
055                notifications = client.getZmqNotifications();
056            } catch (IOException e) {
057                // TODO: Handle this more gracefully, without runtime exception
058                throw new RuntimeException(e);
059            }
060        }
061    }
062
063    private URI mapUri(URI configuredZmqUri) {
064        return zmqPort(rpcUri, configuredZmqUri);
065    }
066
067    /**
068     * Create tcp URI for ZMQ using host of JSON-RPC client and port of URI returned with zmqnotifications
069     *
070     * @param client http URI of JSON-RPC server
071     * @param zmqPubURI ZMQ tcp URI returned with getzmqnotifications
072     * @return A tcp URI for ZMQ using host from client port from zmqPubURI
073     */
074    private static URI zmqPort(URI client, URI zmqPubURI) {
075        URI updated;
076        try {
077            updated = new URI("tcp", null, client.getHost(), zmqPubURI.getPort(), null, null, null);
078        } catch (URISyntaxException e) {
079            throw new RuntimeException(e);
080        }
081        return updated;
082    }
083
084}
